data.fallbackStepFromFailureDetail: Unknown model: ollama/llama3. Found agents.defaults.models["ollama/llama3"], but no matching models.providers["ollama"].models[] entry. Add { "id": "llama3", "name": "llama3" } to models.providers["ollama"].models[] to register this provider model. For custom or proxy providers, also set api and baseUrl so requests route to the intended endpoint. See https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/model-provide…
